title: Full-Stack Web Development
description: End-to-end web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). From database design to REST APIs to polished React frontends — fully integrated and production-ready.

title: Cloud Solutions (AWS)
description: Cloud architecture and deployment on AWS. I provision and configure services like EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, RDS, and Lambda to build reliable, scalable, and cost-efficient cloud infrastructure.

title: UI/UX Design & Frontend
description: Accessible, responsive user interfaces designed in Figma and built with React, Tailwind CSS, and modern CSS. Pixel-perfect implementation with keyboard navigation and WCAG compliance.

title: IT Consulting & Management
description: Technology strategy grounded in a Master's in Information Systems and a BSc in IT Management. I help teams align technology decisions with business objectives, governance, and operational efficiency.
